[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000100 2
1 110110011 6
2 010000010 2
3 111011111 8
4 101010000 3
5 110011001 5
6 000000000 a
7 111010100 5
